message: ContractAcceptDraft returns planValidationError directly, so accepting an invalid drafted plan loses the structured plan validation issue codes.
Accepting an invalid drafted plan rejects the change but drops the existing plan validation issue details, so callers do not see codes like CYCLE_IN_DAG or MISSING_DEPENDENCY as required.

The drafted-plan round-trip test bypasses the drafter output parsing and proposal-recording path by writing contractDraftProposalDocument directly, so the new plan field on contractDraftProposalBlock and recordContractDraftProposal are not tested for plan.tasks[] input.
The invalid drafted-plan accept tests only require any non-zero exit and do not assert the required actionable plan validation issue code.
The plan show --json tests do not verify that all task fields are emitted.
The read-only test for plan show does not cover all records named by the contract.
The new user-visible `pactum plan show` command is not documented in the workflow command table, leaving the public command reference stale.
